interactions.summary: How do you defend against artillery strikes? I don't know. You don't. But they would fire back, right? They'd get themselves into a pretty ugly war. South Korea have a big military. Well, my people are poor. They're not afraid to die. In fact, I've sent thousands of them to go to Ukraine to fight for the Russians and they fight to the death because they're poor and they don't fight to the death. If they're allowed to...
